name: oihana-next-ui
description: Oihana Next.js UI component library — reusable components, hooks and utilities built with React 19, Next.js, Tailwind CSS and DaisyUI

scripts.version: bun inject-version && bun generate-exports && git add src/version.js
scripts.release: npm publish --access public && git push origin-ssh && git push origin-ssh --tags
scripts.stage: git add -A && git diff-index --quiet HEAD || git commit -m 'chore: prepare release'
